caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt is speaking into a grey microphone. His shirt features the white and red text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". He is positioned in a room with a white mannequin wearing a white shirt and various framed photos on the wall behind him. To the right of the mannequin, clothing racks are visible. Two logos appear on the screen: one on the left is a circular badge with "D-REZZ" and "THE PODCAST" written inside, and another on the right reads "BODILY" in red. Across the sequence, the man's mouth moves as he speaks, and he slightly shifts his head and facial expression, while the background and equipment remain static.
